semantic.role: Internal utility function providing cross-platform repository path normalization for consistent database key representation.
responsibilities: Normalizes raw file system paths to repository-relative logical paths.
Converts Windows backslashes to POSIX forward slashes for cross-platform compatibility.
Strips leading './' and '/' prefixes to ensure paths are relative to the repository root.
Provides a single source of truth for path representation in database lookups and writes.
outOfScope: Handling of absolute paths outside the repository.
invariants: Output is always a POSIX-style string with forward slashes.
Output is always relative to the repository root (no leading slash or './').

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a canonical path representation for the ArchSpine system to ensure consistent data indexing and retrieval across platforms.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Implement atomic transactional sync and cross-platform RepoPath normalization.
